_description: Renaissance DM Tool - GSIB Migration Package Index
_purpose: Complete design specifications to recreate the Renaissance DM Tool in a GSIB Coder workspace with VS Code Cloud + Claude Code

files.01-project-config.json: Project structure, dependencies, vite/ts config, storage keys, file tree
files.02-type-definitions.json: All TypeScript interfaces and types (data model)
files.03-component-designs.json: All React component specifications (props, state, behaviors, UI layout)
files.04-canvas-components.json: ERDViewer, ColumnMapper, FlowchartViewer - Konva canvas specs with exact visual details
files.05-utils-and-logic.json: All utility functions, parsers, services - algorithms and signatures
files.06-styling-themes.json: Complete CSS - all classes, colors, fonts, spacing for light/dark themes
files.07-versioning-components.json: Version history, diff, badge, minimap components
files.08-type-rules.json: Oracle<->PostgreSQL type compatibility rules and type families

phase1_core.description: Data Dictionary (core feature) + DDL parsing + Excel export

gsibNotes.electronNotNeeded: Remove Electron entirely - use pure web app or VS Code extension webview
gsibNotes.storageStrategy: Use VS Code workspace storage API (for extension) or localStorage (for web app)
gsibNotes.noDependencyIssues: All npm packages are standard open source - should work in GSIB npm registry
gsibNotes.offlineCapable: App is fully client-side, no API calls needed
